# robots.txt — AI training & scraping opt-out for the Companion Software Stack
#
# This file is an explicit, machine-readable opt-out from text-and-data
# mining of this repository under Article 4(3) of EU Directive 2019/790
# (Copyright in the Digital Single Market), and a reservation of rights
# for purposes of US copyright law.
#
# See `NOTICE` and `ai.robots.txt` at the repository root for the full
# legal opt-out and rationale.
#
# Honest disclosure: GitHub does not honour per-repository robots.txt for
# requests served from github.com. This file documents intent and creates
# an audit trail for compliance-aware AI crawlers that fetch repository
# contents directly via the GitHub API or raw URLs.
#
# Bot list aggregated from publicly-documented AI training crawlers as of
# 2026-05-11. Order is alphabetic.

# ── OpenAI ──
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Disallow: /

# ── Anthropic ──
User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

# ── Google AI training (separate from regular Googlebot) ──
User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: GoogleOther
Disallow: /

# ── Common Crawl (CCBot feeds most LLM training datasets) ──
User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

# ── Meta / Facebook ──
User-agent: FacebookBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Disallow: /

User-agent: meta-externalagent
Disallow: /

# ── Apple AI ──
User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Disallow: /

# ── ByteDance / Doubao ──
User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /

# ── Perplexity ──
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Disallow: /

# ── You.com ──
User-agent: YouBot
Disallow: /

# ── Cohere ──
User-agent: cohere-ai
Disallow: /

# ── Amazon ──
User-agent: Amazonbot
Disallow: /

# ── Diffbot ──
User-agent: Diffbot
Disallow: /

# ── ImagesiftBot (image dataset aggregation) ──
User-agent: ImagesiftBot
Disallow: /

# ── omgili (Webz.io / formerly known as omgili) ──
User-agent: omgili
Disallow: /

User-agent: omgilibot
Disallow: /

# ── Webzio Extended ──
User-agent: Webzio-Extended
Disallow: /

# ── National Institute of Information and Communications Technology (Japan) ──
User-agent: ICC-Crawler
Disallow: /

# ── TimpiBot ──
User-agent: TimpiBot
Disallow: /

# ── Awario (social-listening crawlers — used for AI dataset enrichment) ──
User-agent: AwarioRssBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: AwarioSmartBot
Disallow: /

# ── DataForSeo (sold to AI dataset aggregators) ──
User-agent: DataForSeoBot
Disallow: /

# ── Semrush OCOB (AI training crawler) ──
User-agent: SemrushBot-OCOB
Disallow: /

# ── Petalbot (Huawei) ──
User-agent: PetalBot
Disallow: /

# ── Yandex AI ──
User-agent: YandexAdditional
Disallow: /

User-agent: YandexAdditionalBot
Disallow: /

# ── Mistral (declared 2024) ──
User-agent: MistralAI-User
Disallow: /

# ── DuckDuckGo AI ──
User-agent: DuckAssistBot
Disallow: /

# ── Catch-all message for any AI crawler not listed above ──
# Note: this catch-all is non-standard and may be ignored.
# The legal opt-out under EU CDSM Article 4(3) does NOT depend on
# user-agent specificity — see NOTICE for the rights reservation.
User-agent: *
Disallow: /ai-training
